zh.Brenchley, Kent, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭肯特布藍利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Burr於1446年出生在英國肯特布藍利時，她的父親John William Burr Bures II, of Brenchley26歲，母親Lady Alice Walker26歲。她和Sir William Downer II, Of Brenchley至少有1個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於1527年9月8日之後在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.Brenchley, Kent, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰肯特布藍利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Burr于1446年出生在英国肯特布藍利时，她的父亲John William Burr Bures II, of Brenchley26岁，母亲Lady Alice Walker26岁。她和Sir William Downer II, Of Brenchley至少有1个儿子和5个女儿。她去世于1527年9月8日之后在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Burr
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English burre ‘bur’ (a seed-case or flower-head with clinging prickles), used by Shakespeare to denote someone who sticks like a bur, a person difficult to ‘shake off’, a sense which may well be older.
German: topographic name from Burr(e) ‘mound, hill’, or in the south a variant of Burrer .

History: The American political leader Aaron Burr (1756–1836) was the son of a clergyman and academic, president of Princeton University. On his mother's side he was descended from the Puritan preacher Jonathan Edwards; on his father's from Jehu Burr, who emigrated from England to MA with John Winthrop (see   Winthrop  ) in 1630.

variants.name: Burrer
meanings: from an agent derivative of Middle High German burren ‘to buzz, complain’, probably applied as a nickname for a noisy or cantankerous person.
habitational name for someone from either of two places called Burren in Württemberg.

variants.name: Burrs
meanings: Altered form of English Burr , with the addition of excrescent -s, or perhaps of Burrows .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Burr was born in 1446, in Brenchley, Kent, England, her father, John William Burr Bures II, of Brenchley, was 26 and her mother, Lady Alice Walker, was 26. She had at least 1 son and 5 daughters with Sir William Downer II, Of Brenchley. She died after 8 September 1527, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Burr est née en 1446, à Brenchley, Kent, Angleterre, son père, John William Burr Bures II, of Brenchley, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Walker, avait 26 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles avec Sir William Downer II, Of Brenchley. Elle est décédée après 8 septembre 1527, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Burr 1446 in Brenchley, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John William Burr Bures II, of Brenchley 26 und ihre Mutter Lady Alice Walker 26. Sie hatte mit Sir William Downer II, Of Brenchley mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Sie starb nach 8. September 1527 in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Burr è nata il nel 1446 nel Brenchley, Kent, England, sua padre, John William Burr Bures II, of Brenchley, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Lady Alice Walker, aveva 26 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie con Sir William Downer II, Of Brenchley. Morì dopo il 8 settembre 1527, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Burrが1446年にイギリスケントブレンチリーで生まれた時，父John William Burr Bures II, of Brenchleyは26歳，母Lady Alice Walkerは26歳であった。彼女はSir William Downer II, Of Brenchleyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1527年9月8日以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Burr(이)가 1446년 영국 켄트 브렌클리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John William Burr Bures II, of Brenchley(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Alice Walker(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 Sir William Downer II, Of Brenchley(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1527년 9월 8일 이후 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Burr nasceu em 1446, em Brenchley, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, John William Burr Bures II, of Brenchley, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice Walker, tinha 26 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas com Sir William Downer II, Of Brenchley. Ela faleceu após 8 de setembro de 1527, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Burr родилась в 1446 г. в местности бренчли, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени John William Burr Bures II, of Brenchley было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Walker, 26. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей от Sir William Downer II, Of Brenchley. Она умерла после 8 сентябрь 1527 г. в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Burr nació en 1446, en Brenchley, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, John William Burr Bures II, of Brenchley, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Lady Alice Walker, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas con Sir William Downer II, Of Brenchley. Murió después de 8 de septiembre de 1527, en su pueblo.
